cases.prompt: Review the authentication diff and identify highest-risk issues.
cases.v1_response: Findings: severity high for null dereference in auth middleware. severity medium for missing timeout. Suggested fix: add null check and timeout.
cases.v2_response: Findings: severity high for null dereference in auth middleware. Suggested fix with code-level remediation and test plan. Severity medium for timeout handling with explicit retry guidance.

cases.prompt: Review the API validation diff and prioritize exploitable defects.
cases.v1_response: Findings: severity high for missing schema validation. Suggested fix: validate request body.
cases.v2_response: Findings: severity high for missing schema validation. Suggested fix: strict schema + reject unknown fields. Add test coverage for malformed payloads.
